calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 3, 2015, in Department 525:
Jeffrey Ladar, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
No Appearance by Appellants/Defendants.

Abandonment of Appeal filed by Appellants on August 27, 2015 is in the Court file.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Jeffrey Ladar is sworn. Plaintiff/Respondent, Jeffrey Ladar requests for an incurred attorney's fees and lost of wage fees.

The Court takes this matter under submission. No newly evidence has been presented in the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.
